title: tragacantha alicantensis
intro: Tragacantha alicantensis, also known as Spanish thistle, is a perennial plant in the genus Cynara, which belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Tragacantha alicantensis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting liver function, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and saponins. Traditionally, the leaves and flowers of the plant are used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, to harness its medicinal properties.
